kirundi.conversion_factor_ratio_equal_to_1_e_g: Igipimo co guhindura = igipimo kingana na 1 (urugero, 1 ft = 12 in → 12 in / 1 ft). Kugwiza naco bihindura urugero bitabanje guhindura agaciro. Imbanziriza za SI (kilo, milli) ni imbaraga za 10 — gusa imura akadomo ka decimal.
kirundi.length_mass_volume_temperature_time_en: Uburebure, ubwinshi, ingano, ubushuhe, igihe, ingufu, umuvundo. Itegeko rimwe rukoze: kurikirana ingero kuri buri ntambwe. Nimba igisubizo cawe ca nyuma kiri muri m² mu gihe washakaga amasegonda, wakoze ikosa ahantu hejuru.
kirundi.daily_life_conversions_f_c_mph_km_h_lb: Ihinduka rya buri munsi (°F↔°C, mph↔km/h, lb↔kg) hamwe n'ibipimo vya AP / SAT / laboratwari. Buri kibazo cerekana igipimo co guhindura nyuma yo gusubiza kugira ngo wubake kwibuka kw'imitsi.
kirundi.real_world_unit_conversion_scenarios_g: Ibihe nyavyo vyo guhindura ingero: ikoreshwa ry'amavuta, guhindura ingano y'amafunguro, kubara ingano y'imiti, kugereranya intera y'urugendo. Ibibazo vy'amagambo ni 80% gutahura ivyasomwe + 20% imibare yo guhindura.
kirundi.click_generate_for_an_ai_crafted_word_: Fyonda Kora kugira ngo ubone ikibazo c'amagambo cakozwe na AI
kirundi.adjust_source_and_target_exponents_10_: Hindura imbaraga z'inkomoko n'intego (10^N). Igikoresho gishira impinduka y'ubunini mu vyiciro 5 bitandukanye. Nta manota, nta kwerekana.
kirundi.hypothesis_what_real_world_examples_sp: Iciyumviro: Ni izihe ngero z'isi nyayo zikubiyemo buri ciciro c'ubunini?
kirundi.compare_cm_km_mm_light_year_how_many_o: Gereranya cm→km, mm→umwaka w'umuco. Buri kimwe OOM zingahe?
kirundi.why_are_scientists_trained_in_orders_o: Kuki abahanga mu vya siyansi batozwa mu rwego rw'ubunini?
kirundi.explain_why_dimensional_reasoning_acro: Sigura impamvu kwiyumvira ku ngano kuri OOM nyinshi bigoye.
kirundi.design_note_discrete_5_state_magnitude: Inyandiko y'igishushanyo: ikimenyetso c'ubunini gitandukanye c'imimerere 5; nta manota y'amakosa; nta kwerekana — ku bushake.
